[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you’ve mentioned, you’re interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That’s reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don’t have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?

[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!

[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you’ve mentioned, you’re interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That’s reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don’t have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!

args.code:
import json

# Analyze the transcript to determine BANT factors
transcript = """[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you've mentioned, you're interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That's reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don't have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!"""

# Check for BANT factors
bant_factors = {
    'Budget': False,
    'Authority': False,
    'Need': False,
    'Timeline': False
}

# Analyze Budget
if '$2,261' in transcript and '$2,000' in transcript and 'fits really well' in transcript:
    bant_factors['Budget'] = True

# Analyze Authority - key phrase about not having final say
if "don't have the final say" in transcript or "need to consult with the finance team" in transcript:
    bant_factors['Authority'] = False  # Explicitly does NOT have authority
else:
    bant_factors['Authority'] = True

# Analyze Need
if "great fit" in transcript and "enhance our simulation capabilities" in transcript:
    bant_factors['Need'] = True

# Analyze Timeline
if "tight timeline" in transcript and "within a day" in transcript:
    # Customer raised timeline concern but was satisfied with response
    bant_factors['Timeline'] = True

# Determine which factors are NOT met
failed_factors = [factor for factor, met in bant_factors.items() if not met]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(failed_factors))

var_functions.query_db:2.Body__c:
[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you’ve mentioned, you’re interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That’s reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don’t have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!

val_args.code:
import json

# Analyze the transcript to determine BANT factors
transcript = """[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you've mentioned, you're interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That's reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don't have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!"""

# Check for BANT factors
bant_factors = {
    'Budget': False,
    'Authority': False,
    'Need': False,
    'Timeline': False
}

# Analyze Budget
if '$2,261' in transcript and '$2,000' in transcript and 'fits really well' in transcript:
    bant_factors['Budget'] = True

# Analyze Authority - key phrase about not having final say
if "don't have the final say" in transcript or "need to consult with the finance team" in transcript:
    bant_factors['Authority'] = False  # Explicitly does NOT have authority
else:
    bant_factors['Authority'] = True

# Analyze Need
if "great fit" in transcript and "enhance our simulation capabilities" in transcript:
    bant_factors['Need'] = True

# Analyze Timeline
if "tight timeline" in transcript and "within a day" in transcript:
    # Customer raised timeline concern but was satisfied with response
    bant_factors['Timeline'] = True

# Determine which factors are NOT met
failed_factors = [factor for factor, met in bant_factors.items() if not met]

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(failed_factors))

args.code:
import json

# Analysis of transcript for BANT factors
transcript_text = "[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today? [2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you? [2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss? [2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need. [2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you've mentioned, you're interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct? [2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit. [2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency. [2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that? [2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient. [2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That's reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units? [2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish. [2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don't have the final say. [2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team? [2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful. [2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side? [2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava. [2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day! [2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!"

# Evaluate BANT factors
budget_met = "2261" in transcript_text and "2000" in transcript_text and "fits really well" in transcript_text
authority_met = "don't have the final say" not in transcript_text and "consult with the finance team" not in transcript_text
need_met = "great fit" in transcript_text and "enhance our simulation capabilities" in transcript_text
timeline_met = "within a day" in transcript_text

failed_factors = []
if not budget_met:
    failed_factors.append("Budget")
if not authority_met:
    failed_factors.append("Authority")
if not need_met:
    failed_factors.append("Need")
if not timeline_met:
    failed_factors.append("Timeline")

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(failed_factors))

This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish. [2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don't have the final say. [2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team? [2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful. [2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side? [2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava. [2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day! [2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!"

# Evaluate BANT factors
budget_met = "2261" in transcript_text and "2000" in transcript_text and "fits really well" in transcript_text
authority_met = "don't have the final say" not in transcript_text and "consult with the finance team" not in transcript_text
need_met = "great fit" in transcript_text and "enhance our simulation capabilities" in transcript_text
timeline_met = "within a day" in transcript_text

failed_factors = []
if not budget_met:
    failed_factors.append("Budget")
if not authority_met:
    failed_factors.append("Authority")
if not need_met:
    failed_factors.append("Need")
if not timeline_met:
    failed_factors.append("Timeline")

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(failed_factors))

[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you’ve mentioned, you’re interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That’s reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don’t have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!
